text: The atmosphere here is tinged with anticipation and curiosity. The sterile and reflective surfaces of the first space evoke a sense of formality and quiet; I feel like a philosopher lost at the frontier between practicality and abstraction. Moving toward the colorful, informative wall of the second room, I am greeted by ideas, inventions, and inquiries. Inspiration stirs within me—a merging of clarity and creative confusion, inviting deep questions about technology, progress, and humanity’s dialogue with machines. I feel both grounded and elevated in this place, both a witness and a participant in the dance of knowledge.
